method.included_scope: tracked files plus non-ignored untracked files in the working tree
method.excluded_scope: ignored files such as .git internals, caches, virtualenvs, and build outputs; no production code was modified
method.python_loc_definition: physical lines per .py file using UTF-8 text decode with replacement; blank and comment lines included
method.directory_depth_definition: for files under src/, tests/, and docs/, depth is the number of directories between that root and the file parent; files directly under the root have depth 0
